title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 483.145 - Court to reconstruct records, when
text:
483.145.  Court to reconstruct records, when. — In the event that a case file or record is lost or destroyed, it may be reconstructed under the supervision of the court.
(RSMo 1939 § 2006, A.L. 1978 H.B. 1634) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1842; 1919 § 2339; 1909 § 3861 
Effective 1-02-79
